summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-14 through REQ-17) comprehensively. A Classifieds page at /classifieds is added with nav link, retro masthead header, static ad library (36 ads across 6 categories), multi-column newspaper grid layout with category headers using ornamental styling and diagonal stripe accents, monospace typewriter body font, responsive layout, and a submission form with character counters, localStorage persistence, fake username generation, and timestamps. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: Optional contact field in the user submission form
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-17 specifies only a category dropdown, headline field, and body textarea for the submission form. The diff adds an optional contact/phone field to the form, which was not requested for user submissions (contact info was only specified for the static library ads in REQ-15).
